profile.channel_mismatch_note: HQ Newcastle UK — channel mismatch. Significant Houston TX operational hub but UK incorporation drives mismatch flag.

signals.signal_title: TechnipFMC acquires Datagration (PetroVisor/EcoVisor) Q3 2024 — production AI platform
signals.signal_description: TechnipFMC acquired Datagration Solutions in Q3 2024, adding the PetroVisor production optimization AI platform and EcoVisor ESG analytics platform to its Digital Solutions portfolio. Represents a significant AI/digital signal and creates active IT integration demand.

spend_model_flags.ai_maturity_notes: Datagration acquisition (PetroVisor/EcoVisor) is a meaningful AI signal — production optimization AI platform. CEO publicly names digital innovation as strategic pillar. Real-time digital wellsite monitoring contract confirms operational AI deployment. No CAIO or NVIDIA partnership found. Score 10 — below threshold.
spend_model_flags.channel_mismatch_notes: HQ Newcastle UK — channel mismatch. However TechnipFMC has a significant Houston TX operational hub. Technology decisions may be split between UK and Houston. Mismatch flag applied conservatively given UK incorporation.

enrichment_notes: FY2024 revenue $9.08B — record year. ~21,000 employees. Revenue below $10B — no OEM deduction. HQ UK = channel mismatch (though significant Houston presence). Datagration acquisition Q3 2024 adds AI/digital signal. No CIO or MSP identified. SAP probable. UK country multiplier applies. Confidence MEDIUM.
